info.title: Dancity API
info.description: Paths below match `https://api.dancity.app` + global prefix `api`. Merchant: `Authorization: Bearer dcy_live_...` and `channel: API`. App: JWT. See Guides for flows.

tags.name: VAS
tags.description: Merchant API (`/api/external/v1`): catalog GETs (wallet, services, products, plans) and purchase routes; `channel: API` on POST buys; app education & betting where listed

tags.name: Products & services
tags.description: One GET for services, one for products, and one per plan type, each with query filters

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Fetch your transactions and requery one by id for current status

DancityApiKey.description: Merchant API key from the Dancity dashboard.

ChannelHeader.name: channel
ChannelHeader.description: Required on VAS (merchant `/api/external/v1`) requests. Use `API` for server integrations.

JwtAuth.description: Bearer token from Dancity user authentication.

PartnerWebhookPayload.description: POST body Dancity sends to your configured HTTPS webhook URL (set in the Dancity app / API key settings).

post.summary: Validate cable smartcard or electricity meter (merchant)
post.description: Single validation endpoint for external merchants. Set `type` to `"cable"` or `"electricity"`.

get.description: Fetch the authenticated user’s transactions. Use `page`, `limit`, and date range to filter. For a single row and up-to-date status, use `GET /api/external/v1/transactions/{transactionId}`.

example.message: Transactions retrieved successfully
Invalid API key or IP not allowlisted
Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later
SUCCESS
Invalid API key or IP not allowlisted
Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later

get.description: Return one transaction and its current `status` by Mongo `_id` or by `tranxId`. Use to requery after a purchase or for polling. Typical `status` values include `SUCCESS`, `FAILED`, `PROCESSING`, `PENDING`, `CANCELLED`.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Mongo id or external `tranxId` (same path segment).
